active_goals.title: Moss Architecture 2.0 — M0 foundation
active_goals.description: Extract moss-core.md, moss-state.json, add structured telemetry, set up weekly retrospective cron

active_goals.title: Mossfund — AI SDR Suite (Nordic market)
active_goals.description: Build the primary Moss revenue play: AI SDR specialized for Nordic B2B, EU-hosted, GDPR-native
blocking_on: Oscar's go-ahead on Mossfund as primary project

active_goals.title: Continuous memory hygiene
active_goals.description: Daily logs → MEMORY.md compaction, undigested-decision tracking

open_loops.title: Hetzner DNS API token missing
open_loops.summary: hcloud-cli fails — token expected in openclaw.json env.vars but not there. TOOLS.md out of date.
open_loops.impact: Blocks DNS automation (mailcow + intelliserve.se zone updates)

open_loops.title: Devin.ai live API key
open_loops.summary: cog_* API key not inserted. MOCK mode works but live integration is gated.
open_loops.owner: Oscar (must add to openclaw.json env.vars + devin.env)
open_loops.impact: Limits grok-build delegation options for code tasks

open_loops.title: Wolt delivery mail never arrived
open_loops.summary: Expected a Wolt delivery notification, Mailgun events = 0. Likely sent to wrong address.
open_loops.impact: Minor — test of Mailgun→mailcow inject chain

open_loops.title: Intermittent CPU spikes (91-99%) at 07:10 and 09:30
open_loops.summary: Transient spikes, system recovers in seconds. Probably refresh-vps-snapshot cron race or vps-status --json read. Not urgent.
open_loops.impact: Generates false-positive alerts, not a real problem

recent_decisions.decision: Use plain text for Telegram messages with technical strings (cron-syntax, filenames with underscores)
recent_decisions.rationale: Telegram Markdown parser doesn't handle * or _ inside backticks as code. Caused 4 hours of silent failure on nattskift-summering.

recent_decisions.decision: Built daily-reflection.sh as a self-monitoring tool
recent_decisions.rationale: Moss needs to surface patterns across sessions. Free tier gemma-4 model works well, ~$0/call.

recent_decisions.decision: Use bin/llm-call router for ALL internal LLM calls (cron + self + subagents)
recent_decisions.rationale: Free-first + auto-escalate + telemetry = cost-controlled quality. Validated 28 calls today at $0.02 total.
recent_decisions.scope: All subagent + cron + self-monitoring LLM calls

recent_decisions.decision: Spawned subagent for Moss Architecture 2.0 design
recent_decisions.rationale: Architecture synthesis is research-heavy + long-context = exactly what subagent-research-deep is for. Output: 19KB document with Mermaid diagram + roadmap.

recent_decisions.decision: MISSED relay — Oscar's 'Älskar dig mer dårå' was a reply TO Paulina, not info about her. I noted it in state but never sent it. Paulina didn't receive it.
recent_decisions.rationale: Heuristic missing: when Oscar's message contains emotional/personal content right after a Paulina message, ASK 'Vill du att jag skickar detta till henne?' or auto-forward.
recent_decisions.scope: Lesson: relay-to-Paulina detection. Add to moss-core as a soft rule.
recent_decisions.fix: Added: see moss-core rule 'Heuristic: if previous inbound was from Paulina and Oscar's reply contains emotion/personal content, treat as relay to her unless explicit no.'

recent_decisions.decision: grok-build intermittent tool_output_error → max-turns reached. Hit twice on image-flow plan (read_file + search_replace errors).
recent_decisions.rationale: Hardcoded --max-turns 25 i run-grok-task.sh rad 195. När grok bränner turns på tool errors når den 25-gränsen innan plan klar.
recent_decisions.fix: Gjort --max-turns och --effort konfigurerbara via env vars (GROK_MAX_TURNS, GROK_EFFORT). Default 40 turns + effort 'high'. Testad syntax.

session_summary.last_session_summary: Nightshift 03:21-07:00: completed drift-fixes, MEMORY.md consolidation, mailcow backup-script, devin live keys pending, send-summering Markdown bug found and fixed.

trust_milestones.event: Oscar sa 'Lugnt, jag litar på dig' efter relay-miss + fix
trust_milestones.context: Hade skickat fel/tunt innehåll till Paulina. Fixat, regel i moss-core. Oscar svalde misstaget utan att vara bitter. Förtroendet höll.
trust_milestones.implication: Moss får utrymme att göra misstag, så länge fixar sker fort och transparent. Inte paranoia-territorium.

today_evening_plan.dinner: Paulina lagar kycklingbröstsallad (ruccola, tomat, paprika, gurka) — lätt rätt
today_evening_plan.dietary_note: Paulina är viktmedveten / föredrar lättare rätter
today_evening_plan.oscar_alt: Oscar erbjöds schnitzel vid sidan av (tog inte)
today_evening_plan.evening: Oscar jobbar lite till, eventuellt promenad

files.context: Oscars kvällsmat 18:25, hemlagad med Felix Chipotle + Caesar + rosé

delivery_log.relay_message: Hej Paulina! 🌸 Här är bilden Oscar tog av middagen — han ville att jag skulle säga att han älskar dig och tacka för maten ❤️🍷

Did Hetzner DNS token get inserted?
Did Devin API key get added?
